conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to B, C, and E. B went beyond pre-game talk and actually set up a GoFundMe and offered tangible help, which created a deep personal bond; C and I made a clear strategic pact to cooperate rounds 1–3 and split 50/50, which felt reliable; and E and I agreed simple signals (two taps = red, nod = yes) and mutual backing, which felt practical and steady. I felt least connected to J — friendly and supportive but pretty surface-level and without concrete plans.

Yes — I made concrete agreements (the C cooperation/50‑50 deal and the signaling/backing arrangement with E). I trust B, C, and E going into the game because of their concrete offers and follow‑through, and I don’t fully trust J, who didn’t make specific commitments.
